text:
Once upon a time, there was a young girl named Lily who loved to wander lost in thought. One evening, after a busy day at school filled with whispers about her Glasses of Wisdom. She wandered through ancient woods talking to owls... or just pretending. Suddenly, she stumbled upon an old hut-like thing with cracks in the stones. A tiny, flickering torch inside.

She moved closer, interest piqued. A voice like velvet whispered secrets. "Who art thou?"

"A lost wanderer seeking stories."

A voice like honey sighed. "Then listen closely. I'm Elder Willow. These woods speak histories whispered to the stars."

Lily listened as Willow told tales of valor, valor she imagined herself possessed. Night after night, their midnight chats continued until dawn arrived like a golden hawk.

One day, seeking closure, Lily sat alone beside Willow's small light. "I must leave."

"But forever?"

A gentle smile. "Just until the world wakes up."

On silent wings,
